ignore-rules.description: A list of rule IDs that will not be applied in scans.

use-rules.description: A list of rule IDs that will be applied in scans. If specified, only these rules will be used (unless other configuration causes them to be ignored).

global-config.description: Global settings for the IaC scanner.

ignore-paths.description: A list of pathnames and glob patterns; files and directories matching those patterns will not be scanned.

only-paths.description: A list of pathnames and glob patterns; only files and directories matching those patterns will be scanned.

ignore-severities.description: A list of severities; findings matching one of these severities will not be reported.

only-severities.description: A list of severities; only findings matching one of these severities will be reported.

ignore-categories.description: A list of categories; findings matching one of these categories will not be reported.

only-categories.description: A list of categories; only findings matching one of those categories will be reported.

ignore-platforms.description: A list of platforms; rules from these platforms will not be applied in scans.

only-platforms.description: A list of platforms; only rules from these platforms will be applied in scans.

ruleConfigs.description: A map of rule IDs to rule configurations.

ignore-paths.description: A list of pathnames and glob patterns; this rule will not apply to files and directories matching those patterns.

only-paths.description: A list of pathnames and glob patterns; this rule will only apply to files and directories matching those patterns.

severity.description: Change the severity of findings generated by this rule.

pathList.description: List of file paths or glob patterns.

anyOf.$comment: will be internally coerced to string
will be internally coerced to string
